channel.title: Defense on DocB — Timeline
channel.description: Recent content in Defense on DocB — Timeline

item.title: We're Bolting Dummy Weights Into Our Most Advanced Fighters
item.description: F-35 Lot 17 delivered without radars. 11,000 munitions burned in 16 days. The US defence industrial base is failing at quality and surge simultaneously.

item.title: The Pentagon Has 60 Days of Rare Earths Left
item.description: PLA purges narrow China's coercive toolkit — leaving rare earth export controls as the one weapon that requires no command chain integrity
